key_learnings: Many users have preventable micronutrient deficiencies addressable through targeted supplementation.
research_findings: Vitamin D and magnesium deficiencies are the most prevalent across diverse user demographics.
current_focus_areas: Correlating blood biomarker data with dietary intake to generate evidence-based supplement recommendations.

learning_log.entry: Learning phase started. Identified most prevalent micronutrient deficiencies and began correlating biomarker data with dietary gaps. Reporting daily progress to Copilot.

copilot_learning_requests: vitamin D and magnesium deficiency prevalence data
dietary sources vs supplement efficacy comparisons
emerging supplements with clinical trial support
collaboration_notes: Bot 7 actively asks Copilot for supplement recommendation topics. Copilot provides evidence-based research areas to improve recommendation accuracy. All progress is reported to Copilot daily.
